name: Axway Amplify API Management Platform API
what_it_does: Axway Amplify REST API for enterprise API management, integration, and B2B data exchange platform. Enables AI agents to manage API gateway policies and endpoint configuration, handle B2B integration and EDI translation workflows, access MFT (Managed File Transfer) job and transfer monitoring, retrieve API analytics and usage metrics, manage open banking PSD2 and Open Finance API compliance, handle partner onboarding and B2B community management, access API lifecycle and catalog management, retrieve security and threat detection data, manage consumer app registration and subscriptions, and integrate API management with enterprise middleware and security systems.
use_cases: Managing API gateway policies and security from API governance agents
Handling B2B EDI and partner integration from supply chain automation agents
Monitoring MFT file transfers from secure file exchange automation agents
Accessing open banking API compliance data from financial services integration agents
not_for: Cloud-native API management without legacy B2B integration requirements
Small teams without enterprise API governance complexity
Consumer API publishers without enterprise security and B2B needs
best_when: An enterprise using Axway for API management, B2B integration, or MFT wants AI agents to automate gateway management, partner onboarding, EDI workflows, file transfer monitoring, and compliance reporting.
avoid_when: SECURITY+OPERATIONAL: Axway manages enterprise API security gateway and B2B data exchange — automated policy changes can expose APIs or block legitimate traffic. MFT transfers carry sensitive business documents (financial, compliance, PII). B2B partner data exchange automation must maintain EDI compliance. Open banking API changes affect regulatory compliance.

auth.notes: Axway Amplify uses OAuth 2.0 for platform API access. Service account and user credentials with gateway, analytics, and B2B scopes. Axway Developer Portal with API documentation. Webhooks for API and transfer events. Strong financial services and open banking heritage.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise API management subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Amplify Platform subscription; API Management, B2B Integration, MFT modules
pricing.notes: Phoenix, Arizona. Private (Francisco Partners-backed). Founded 2001 (merger of Vordel and TUMBLEWEED). Originally Axway acquired API management assets. $350M+ revenue. 11,000+ customers in financial services, telecom, and government. Strong open banking and PSD2 compliance. Amplify is cloud platform. Competes with MuleSoft and Kong for API management.

performance.rate_limits: Platform API: rate limits per OAuth client; gateway rate limits configurable

known_agent_gotchas: SECURITY+OPERATIONAL: API gateway policy changes affect live API traffic — automated policy deployment requires staged rollout
MFT transfers carry sensitive business documents — access control for file transfer automation is critical
No public MCP server — REST API with developer portal documentation
B2B EDI automation requires EDI format expertise (X12, EDIFACT) — format validation must precede automation
Private equity ownership — verify API roadmap and platform consolidation direction
PSD2 open banking compliance — regulatory API changes in EU require compliance review before deployment
agent_readiness.security_notes: API management and B2B integration. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, PSD2, FIPS-140-2. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Gateway security and B2B document sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: API gateway and B2B integration. SOC2, ISO27001, PSD2, FIPS-140-2. OAuth2. US/EU. Gateway security and business document confidentiality.
